title: GUISe
description: Minecraft GUI in Sodium Mod style
body:
## ![Graphical User Interface Sodium Eyesight](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed80140b9e3134d8c0dcc6cdc2a2ed295c8c6d87.png)
## Graphical User Interface Sodium Eyesight (GUISe) - This resource pack changes the GUI of Minecraft settings and future mods to match the style of Sodium.
![Main menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a5e453492844cf1140e28e6d306d559256b952f.png)

<details>
<summary>Supported mods</summary>
  
-   [Mod menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
-   [iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)
-   [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)
-   [language reload](https://modrinth.com/mod/language-reload)
 
  _P.S. There will be more in the future._
</details>
